# Pull Request

## Summary
What does this change do and why?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Protocol support extension
- [ ] Vendor fingerprint addition
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `python -m compileall hvac_scanner` passes locally
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` (or a new version section)
- [ ] README / docs updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, site-identifying network info, or captured packets from
      non-consenting third parties included

## How to reproduce / verify
Steps a reviewer can follow to confirm the change works.

## Related issues
Closes # / Refs #
